fields.name: rowType
fields.label: Row Type
fields.description: Use landing, question, question:<id>, or option.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Content
fields.description: Landing uses P1 title, P2 subtitle, P3 tagline. Questions use P1 title, P2 subtitle. Options use P1 badge, P2 title, P3 description.

fields.name: destination
fields.label: Destination / CTA
fields.description: Landing uses button text. Options use #next, #step:<id>, /fragments/... for inline results, or /page for navigation.

fields.name: rowType
fields.label: Row Type
fields.description: Use question to start a step, then add option rows below it.

fields.name: label
fields.label: Question Text or Option Label
fields.description: For options, Label|URL is supported as a shorthand.

fields.name: url
fields.label: Destination URL (Options: #next or /path)
fields.description: Use #next or leave empty to advance; same-origin URLs route immediately.

fields.name: placeholder
fields.label: Placeholder Text
fields.description: The placeholder text shown in the search input

fields.name: alignment
fields.label: Alignment
fields.description: Horizontal alignment of the search bar

fields.name: resultCount
fields.label: Results Count
fields.description: Number of products to show in search results

fields.name: source

fields.description: URL to the query index JSON (defaults to /query-index.json)

fields.description: Automatically use browser geolocation on page load

fields.description: Comma-separated radius options shown in the UI (example: 0,5,10,25,50)
